challenges.no_challenges: You haven't started any challenges yet. Browse clips and accept a challenge!
challenges.start_message: You're about to start your challenge — are you ready? Watch all subclips and the main clip to complete it!
challenges.sub_required_message: This content requires an active subscription to access. Upgrade your plan to start challenges!

course.step_watch_main: Watch the main clip first — it's the foundation of this course
course.step_preview: Subclips marked with 👁 are free previews you can watch anytime
course.step_start: Start the course to unlock all steps and track your progress
course.step_complete: Complete all steps by watching each video from start to finish
course.main_clip_required_msg: You must watch the main clip from start to finish before course steps can be unlocked.
course.start_intro: Ready to begin? Here's how this course works:
course.start_step1: Watch the main clip fully — this is required before any step counts
course.start_step2: Then work through each step by watching it from start to finish
course.start_step3: Complete all steps to finish the course and earn your badge
course.overview_heading: Course Overview — Watch the full demonstration
course.ready_to_start: You've watched the main clip — you're all set to begin!
course.watch_first_hint: Watch the main clip from start to finish to unlock the course steps.
course.cover_subtitle: Learn this skill step by step
course.course_complete_desc: You've finished all videos in this course.
course.challenge_limit_message: You can have up to {max} active challenges. Complete some to start new ones.
course.start_challenge_modal_title: Start a challenge to see course steps
course.start_challenge_modal_desc: To unlock and watch all course steps, you need to start a challenge. Your progress will be tracked as you complete each step.

onboarding.step1_desc: Each course features a main clip showing the final result — the skill you'll learn. Browse freely and find what inspires you!
onboarding.step2_desc: Watch the main clip and selected preview lessons for free — no subscription needed. Get a taste of what each course offers before committing.
onboarding.step3_desc: With an active subscription, click Start Challenge to unlock all step-by-step lessons. No extra payments — everything is included!
onboarding.step4_desc: Your progress is tracked automatically as you complete each lesson. Finish all steps to earn the trophy and master the skill!

tips.subscribe_desc: Subscribe to unlock every step-by-step lesson in this course. Preview clips are available for free!
tips.start_challenge_desc: Click Start Challenge to begin tracking your progress through all lessons in this course.

auth.register_to_access_desc: Create a free account and log in to unlock all course content, start challenges, and track your progress.
auth.login_to_rate_subtitle: Create a free account to share your rating and unlock the full experience.
auth.login_reason_1: Your ratings help other players find the best courses and improve their training.
auth.login_reason_2: Track your rated courses and get personalized recommendations based on your preferences.
auth.login_reason_3: Start challenges, earn badges, and see your progress across all courses.
auth.login_reason_4: Join a community of football enthusiasts — comment, rate, and learn together.
auth.rate_tooltip: Rating is available only for logged-in users
